title: Fix This Next
author: Mike Michalowicz
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A 5-step staircase / hierarchy, each step labelled. BOTTOM = Sales (foundation), TOP = Legacy. The TOP step is RED — the thing the entrepreneur is supposed to fix NEXT (the lowest unfixed level). -->
  <g font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" letter-spacing="0.06em">
    <!-- Step 5 (TOP, RED): Legacy -->
    <g transform="translate(800 320)">
      <rect x="-580" y="0" width="1160" height="100" fill="#fc1c46"/>
      <text x="0" y="62" text-anchor="middle" font-size="34" font-weight="500" fill="#ffffff">5 · LEGACY</text>
    </g>
    <!-- Step 4: Impact -->
    <g transform="translate(800 440)">
      <rect x="-470" y="0" width="940" height="100" fill="none" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="2"/>
      <text x="0" y="62" text-anchor="middle" font-size="30" font-weight="500" fill="#cccccc">4 · IMPACT</text>
    </g>
    <!-- Step 3: Order -->
    <g transform="translate(800 560)">
      <rect x="-360" y="0" width="720" height="100" fill="none" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="2"/>
      <text x="0" y="62" text-anchor="middle" font-size="28" font-weight="500" fill="#cccccc">3 · ORDER</text>
    </g>
    <!-- Step 2: Profit -->
    <g transform="translate(800 680)">
      <rect x="-250" y="0" width="500" height="100" fill="none" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="2"/>
      <text x="0" y="62" text-anchor="middle" font-size="26" font-weight="500" fill="#cccccc">2 · PROFIT</text>
    </g>
    <!-- Step 1 (BOTTOM): Sales -->
    <g transform="translate(800 800)">
      <rect x="-140" y="0" width="280" height="100" fill="none" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2"/>
      <text x="0" y="62" text-anchor="middle" font-size="24" font-weight="500" fill="#cccccc">1 · SALES</text>
    </g>
    <!-- Three ascending tick labels on left side -->
    <g font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">
      <text x="-720" y="365" text-anchor="end">FIX NEXT</text>
      <text x="-720" y="925" text-anchor="end">FOUNDATION</text>
    </g>
    <!-- An arrow on the right pointing UP -->
    <g stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1" fill="none">
      <line x1="1380" y1="900" x2="1380" y2="320"/>
      <polyline points="1370,360 1380,320 1390,360"/>
    </g>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: The Business Hierarchy of Needs is a 5-step staircase; we render it literally. Sales at the bottom (foundation, 280px wide), then Profit, Order, Impact, then LEGACY at the top in RED (the highest aspiration, the thing you fix LAST in the framework, but framed as the urgency target). The 380px weight-500 title sits centered across the staircase, breaking through the steps.
